title: Tana Jones
compiled_truth: Tana Jones is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-03-08), Tana Jones sent 7991 and received 6922 emails, totalling 14913 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (971), [Harry Collins](people/harry-collins) (856), [Leslie Hansen](people/leslie-hansen) (832), [Marie Heard](people/marie-heard) (826), [Alan Aronowitz](people/alan-aronowitz) (816). Mailbox folders observed: _exchange_info, archive, deleted_items, fin_desk, inbox, sent.
